urgent.action: Replace all public references of 'Feb 25' with 'Early March 2026' across metadata, OG tags, and on-page copy, then redeploy and reindex critical pages.
urgent.reasoning: Live /en page HTML still contains 'Grand Opening Feb 25', which creates trust and relevance issues for branded searches.

urgent.action: Rewrite title/meta for top impression pages with intent-matched copy (menu, Waikiki, mochi donuts, bingsu) and clear CTA.
urgent.reasoning: CTR is ~1.0% with avg position 6.6, indicating snippet mismatch despite usable rankings.

quickWins.action: Update homepage and /en meta descriptions to include 'Proudly serving Honolulu coffee', address, and current opening language.
quickWins.reasoning: Branded traffic already exists; better SERP messaging can increase clicks quickly.

quickWins.action: Add keyword-specific internal links from homepage hero/sections to top menu pages with descriptive anchor text.
quickWins.reasoning: 15 indexed pages and low clicks suggest authority distribution can be improved fast.

quickWins.action: Add descriptive alt text and compress largest hero/menu images on /en.
quickWins.reasoning: Mobile Lighthouse LCP is 8.1s, pointing to above-the-fold asset opportunity.

opportunities.action: Create/expand English/Japanese/Korean local-intent pages for Waikiki breakfast, late-night desserts, and nearby landmarks.
opportunities.reasoning: Tourist-intent demand is likely under-captured; multilingual long-tail can scale impressions.

opportunities.action: Expand FAQ with opening timeline, parking, halal/vegetarian notes, and menu highlights; validate structured data.
opportunities.reasoning: Rich result eligibility can raise CTR without waiting for rank changes.

insights.observation: Average position is strong (6.6) but CTR is low (1.0%).
insights.suggestion: Prioritize snippet optimization before large content expansion.

insights.observation: Desktop performance is strong (94) while mobile is moderate (62) with high LCP.
insights.suggestion: Focus first on mobile hero payload and render path simplification.
